info.name: Microsoft Azure MicrosoftSerialConsoleClient
info.description: The Azure Serial Console allows you to access the serial console of a Virtual Machine or VM scale set instance

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Resourceprovidernamespace Parentresourcetype Parentresource Providers Microsoft Serialconsole Serialports Serialport Connect

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

variable.description: (Required) Subscription ID which uniquely identifies the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call requiring it.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The namespace of the resource provider.
(Required) The resource type of the parent resource.  For example: 'virtualMachines' or 'virtualMachineScaleSets'
(Required) The resource name, or subordinate path, for the parent of the serial port. For example: the name of the virtual machine.
(Required) The name of the serial port to connect to.

request.description: Connect to serial port of the target resource

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.
